title: Mardi Himal Trek
tagline: A short and scenic trek offering breathtaking close-up views of Machapuchare and the Annapurna range.
overview: The journey begins with a scenic drive from Pokhara to Siddhing, where the trekking trail gradually ascends through serene forests and traditional mountain villages. From Siddhing to Low Camp, the path winds through dense rhododendron and oak forests, offering occasional glimpses of the majestic Annapurna range. As you continue toward High Camp, the landscape transforms into an alpine environment surrounded by towering Himalayan peaks. From here, an early morning hike to the Mardi Himal Viewpoint (4,500m) rewards trekkers with a breathtaking sunrise over Machapuchare (Fishtail), Hiunchuli, and Annapurna South. The return journey descends through Forest Camp to Kalimati, passing lush woodlands and tranquil valleys rich in biodiversity before driving back to Pokhara.
includes: Airport arrival and departure transfers (private vehicle)
Kathmandu–Pokhara round-trip (flight or drive)
All necessary trekking permits and national park fees
Accommodation in tea houses during the trek
Full board meals during trekking (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)
Experienced English-speaking guide and porter
Staff salary, insurance, and logistics support
Duffel bag (kitbag) for trekking
All applicable government taxes
excludes: International airfare and Nepal visa fees
Entry fees for heritage sites, monasteries, and museums
Personal expenses (Wi-Fi, phone calls, charging, laundry, hot showers, tips)
Any services not mentioned in the Includes section

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrival at the airport and transfer to your hotel. Rest and prepare for the trek.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.description: A scenic drive through river valleys and hills takes you to Pokhara, the gateway to the Annapurna region.

itinerary.title: Drive to Siddhing and Trek to Low Camp
itinerary.description: Drive to Siddhing and begin trekking through terraced farmland and forest trails to reach Low Camp.

itinerary.title: Trek from Low Camp to High Camp
itinerary.description: A ridge walk through rhododendron forests opens up to panoramic mountain views as you reach High Camp.

itinerary.title: Hike to Viewpoint and Trek to Rest Camp
itinerary.description: Early morning hike to the viewpoint for sunrise over Machapuchare and Annapurna ranges. After breakfast, descend to Rest Camp.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kalimati and Drive to Pokhara
itinerary.description: Trek through lush forests and bird-rich trails to Kalimati, followed by a scenic drive back to Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Return from Pokhara to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Drive back to Kathmandu, enjoying the scenic landscapes along the way.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

title: Everest Base Camp Trek
tagline: The ultimate Himalayan adventure to the base of the world’s highest peak, rich in culture and breathtaking mountain views.
overview: The Everest Base Camp trek is the world’s most iconic multi-day adventure. Journey deep into the heart of the Himalayas as the trail climbs to high altitudes, unveiling breathtaking views of Mount Everest and surrounding peaks. Experience the rich Sherpa culture of the Khumbu region with its monasteries, prayer flags, and traditional villages. From Lukla, the trail follows the Dudh Kosi Valley to Namche Bazaar, then continues through Tengboche, Dingboche, and beyond to Kala Patthar and Everest Base Camp. This unforgettable journey blends raw natural beauty with cultural immersion.
includes: Airport pick-up and drop-off services
Hotel accommodation in Kathmandu (4 nights, twin sharing, bed & breakfast)
Welcome dinner in Kathmandu
Sagarmatha National Park permits and TIMS card
Domestic flights Kathmandu–Lukla–Kathmandu

Accommodation in lodges/tea houses during the trek
Professional guide and porter (1 porter per 2 trekkers)
Staff salary, insurance, and allowances
Trekking map of Everest region
Comprehensive medical kit

Personal expenses (Wi-Fi, phone, laundry, charging, hot showers)
Any services not mentioned in the Includes section

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport and transfer to the hotel.

itinerary.title: Preparation Day in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Gear check, safety briefing, and preparation for the trek followed by a team dinner.

itinerary.title: Flight to Lukla and Trek to Phakding
itinerary.description: Flight to Lukla followed by a short trek to Phakding through scenic landscapes.

itinerary.title: Trek from Phakding to Namche Bazaar
itinerary.description: Trek crossing suspension bridges including Hillary Bridge before reaching Namche Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day in Namche
itinerary.description: Short hike to Everest View Hotel and visit Sagarmatha National Park Museum.

itinerary.title: Trek from Namche to Debuche
itinerary.description: Trek via Tengboche Monastery with panoramic mountain views.

itinerary.title: Trek from Debuche to Dingboche
itinerary.description: Trek via Tengboche Monastery with panoramic mountain views.

itinerary.title: Trek from Debuche to Dingboche
itinerary.description: Gradual ascent through alpine landscapes to Dingboche.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day in Dingboche
itinerary.description: Hike to Nagarjun Hill for stunning views of Ama Dablam and surrounding peaks.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dingboche to Lobuche
itinerary.description: Trek via Thukla Pass and Everest Memorial sites.

itinerary.title: Everest Base Camp Trek
itinerary.description: Trek to Everest Base Camp and return to Gorak Shep for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Kala Patthar and Trek to Pheriche
itinerary.description: Early morning hike to Kala Patthar for sunrise views of Everest before descending.

itinerary.title: Trek from Pheriche to Namche

itinerary.title: Trek from Namche to Lukla

title: Manaslu Circuit Trek
tagline: A remote and adventurous Himalayan journey circling Mount Manaslu through untouched landscapes and rich mountain culture.
overview: The Manaslu Circuit Trek is a thrilling journey through one of Nepal’s most remote and untouched regions, circling Mount Manaslu (8,163m), the world’s eighth-highest peak. Starting from Jagat after a scenic drive from Kathmandu, the trail passes through traditional villages, ancient monasteries, and diverse landscapes ranging from lush forests to high alpine terrain. Trekkers experience rich Gurung and Tibetan-influenced cultures while enjoying views of Manaslu, Himalchuli, and Ngadi Chuli. The highlight of the trek is crossing the Larkya La Pass (5,160m), offering breathtaking panoramic Himalayan views before descending to Bhimtang and continuing through peaceful valleys to Tilije. This trek combines adventure, culture, and natural beauty in a truly unforgettable Himalayan experience.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kathmandu and transfer to your hotel. Meet the team and prepare for the trek.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Jagat
itinerary.description: A scenic drive through hills, rivers, and rural villages to the starting point of the trek.

itinerary.title: Trek from Jagat to Deng
itinerary.description: Follow the Budhi Gandaki River, crossing suspension bridges and passing waterfalls and villages.

itinerary.title: Trek from Deng to Namrung
itinerary.description: Gradual ascent through forests and stone villages into the upper Manaslu region.

itinerary.title: Trek from Namrung to Lho / Shyala
itinerary.description: Enjoy spectacular views of Mount Manaslu while trekking through alpine villages.

itinerary.title: Trek from Lho / Shyala to Samagaun via Pungyen Gompa
itinerary.description: A culturally rich day visiting Pungyen Gompa before reaching Samagaun.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day in Samagaun
itinerary.description: Rest and adapt to altitude with optional hikes to Manaslu Base Camp or Birendra Lake.

itinerary.title: Trek from Samagaun to Samdo
itinerary.description: A short and scenic trek through open landscapes toward the Tibetan border.

itinerary.title: Trek from Samdo to Dharmasala
itinerary.description: Gradual ascent through high alpine terrain to the base of Larkya La Pass.

itinerary.title: Cross Larkya La Pass and Trek to Bhimtang
itinerary.description: Cross the highest point of the trek with breathtaking views before descending to Bhimtang.

itinerary.title: Trek from Bhimtang to Tilije
itinerary.description: Descend through forests and alpine meadows into warmer valleys.

itinerary.title: Trek and Drive from Tilije to Besisahar
itinerary.description: Short trek followed by a scenic drive out of the mountains.

itinerary.title: Drive from Besisahar to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Return to Kathmandu and reflect on the journey.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

title: Langtang Valley Trek
tagline: A peaceful Himalayan trek close to Kathmandu, rich in culture, forests, and stunning mountain views.
overview: Langtang Valley, located north of Kathmandu within Langtang National Park, is known for its dense forests, glaciers, and Himalayan peaks including Langtang Lirung (7,345m). This moderately easy trek follows the Langtang River through rhododendron forests, waterfalls, and traditional villages inhabited by people of Tibetan origin. The journey leads to Kyangjin Gompa, where trekkers can explore ancient monasteries, yak pastures, and one of Nepal’s oldest cheese factories. Optional hikes to Kyangjin Ri or Tsergo Ri offer breathtaking panoramic views, making this trek a perfect blend of nature, culture, and accessibility.

itinerary.title: Trek to Lama Hotel
itinerary.description: Gradual ascent through rhododendron and oak forests, crossing suspension bridges to reach Lama Hotel.

itinerary.title: Trek to Langtang Village
itinerary.description: Follow the Langtang River through forests into a wide valley with views of Langtang Lirung.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization Day in Langtang
itinerary.description: Rest day with optional hikes and visits to yak pastures for acclimatization.

itinerary.title: Trek to Kyangjin Gompa
itinerary.description: Scenic walk through meadows and mani walls to the spiritual center of the valley.

itinerary.title: Hike to Kyangjin Ri or Tsergo Ri

itinerary.description: Optional visits to monastery, glacier viewpoint, or the local yak cheese factory.

itinerary.title: Trek Back to Lama Hotel

itinerary.title: Trek to Khangjim

itinerary.title: Drive Back to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Return to Kathmandu by road after completing the trek.

itinerary.title: Departure

title: Annapurna Base Camp Trek
tagline: A breathtaking journey into the Annapurna Sanctuary surrounded by towering Himalayan peaks and rich local culture.
overview: The Annapurna Base Camp Trek is a journey into the heart of the Himalayas, where every step feels intimate and unforgettable. The trail winds through terraced fields, rhododendron forests, and traditional Gurung villages before opening into the Annapurna Sanctuary—a natural amphitheater surrounded by peaks like Annapurna I, Machapuchare, Hiunchuli, and Annapurna South. Reaching base camp at 4,130m, trekkers experience breathtaking sunrises and serene mountain landscapes. This trek offers a perfect balance of cultural immersion, comfort, and high-altitude adventure without extreme difficulty.

itinerary.title: Fly to Pokhara and Drive to Ghandruk

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghandruk to Chhomrong

itinerary.title: Trek to Annapurna Base Camp via Machhapuchhre Base Camp

itinerary.title: Trek from Annapurna Base Camp to Bamboo

itinerary.title: Trek from Bamboo to Jhinu Danda

itinerary.title: Drive to Pokhara and Fly to Kathmandu

title: Annapurna Circuit Trek
tagline: A journey through the Annapurna Himalayas, crossing high passes, serene villages, and spectacular lakes, including the legendary Thorong La Pass and Tilicho Lake.
overview: The Annapurna Circuit Trek is an adventure of a lifetime, taking you from lush subtropical valleys to rugged high-altitude landscapes. Walk through rhododendron and pine forests, charming Gurung and Manangi villages, and past turquoise glacial lakes. Cross the legendary Thorong La Pass at 5,416m and witness breathtaking views of Tilicho Lake, one of the highest lakes in the world. Each day brings unique challenges, culture, and scenery, making this trek a perfect balance of adventure, natural beauty, and cultural immersion.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kathmandu and transfer to your hotel. Welcome dinner and trek briefing.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Dharapani
itinerary.description: Drive through scenic valleys, rivers, and terraced fields into the Annapurna region.

itinerary.title: Dharapani to Chame
itinerary.description: Trek through pine forests and small villages with views of Annapurna II and Lamjung Himal.

itinerary.title: Chame to Pisang
itinerary.description: Climb gradually through terraced fields to Pisang, with dramatic cliffs and Pisang Peak as backdrop.

itinerary.title: Pisang to Manang
itinerary.description: Enter high Himalayas, walking past dry landscapes and prayer wheels, opening up to Manang valley.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization in Manang
itinerary.description: Rest day for altitude adjustment. Optional short hikes to nearby viewpoints and glaciers.

itinerary.title: Manang to Tilicho Base Camp
itinerary.description: Trek along rugged trails through rocky terrain to the base of Tilicho Lake.

itinerary.title: Tilicho Lake Hike & Trek to Shree Kharka
itinerary.description: Hike to Tilicho Lake, then descend to Shree Kharka for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Shree Kharka to Thorong Phedi
itinerary.description: Trek through high-altitude landscapes preparing for Thorong La Pass.

itinerary.title: Thorong Phedi – Thorong La Pass to Muktinath
itinerary.description: Early morning ascent to Thorong La Pass. Descend to the sacred town of Muktinath.

itinerary.title: Muktinath to Tatopani
itinerary.description: Drive through deep valleys to Tatopani, known for natural hot springs.

itinerary.title: Tatopani to Ghorepani
itinerary.description: Trek through rhododendron forests and villages, climbing gradually to Ghorepani.

itinerary.title: Poon Hill Sunrise and Trek to Pokhara
itinerary.description: Early morning hike to Poon Hill for sunrise, descend to Nayapul, and drive to Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Pokhara to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Return via scenic drive or flight to Kathmandu. Farewell dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure from Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

title: Gokyo Valley Trek
tagline: A serene Himalayan adventure through pristine alpine landscapes, turquoise glacial lakes, and panoramic mountain vistas including Everest, Cho Oyu, Lhotse, and Makalu.
overview: The Gokyo Valley Trek is a quieter alternative to the classic Everest Base Camp route, taking you deep into the Everest region. Explore alpine landscapes, turquoise glacial lakes, and traditional Sherpa villages while enjoying panoramic views of Everest, Cho Oyu, Lhotse, Makalu, and the massive Ngozumpa Glacier. The trek highlights the ascent of Gokyo Ri, one of the best viewpoints in the Himalayas, combining cultural immersion with spectacular natural scenery.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kathmandu, get welcomed, and briefed about the trek. Time to rest or explore the city.

itinerary.title: Flight to Lukla & Trek to Phakding
itinerary.description: Scenic mountain flight to Lukla, then easy trek along Sherpa villages and Dudh Koshi River to Phakding.

itinerary.title: Trek from Phakding to Namche Bazaar
itinerary.description: Follow the river, cross suspension bridges, and climb gradually to Namche Bazaar, the vibrant hub of the Khumbu region.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization in Namche Bazaar
itinerary.description: Rest and acclimatization day with optional short hikes and sightseeing around Namche.

itinerary.title: Trek from Namche Bazaar to Dole
itinerary.description: Leave the main Everest trail for the quieter Gokyo route, trekking through forests and alpine terrain.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dole to Machhermo
itinerary.description: Ascend gradually through open valleys and yak pastures, enjoying mountain views before reaching Machhermo.

itinerary.title: Trek from Machhermo to Gokyo
itinerary.description: Reach Gokyo Valley, passing turquoise glacial lakes with views of Ngozumpa Glacier and surrounding peaks.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Gokyo – Hike to Gokyo Ri
itinerary.description: Early morning hike to Gokyo Ri for panoramic Himalayan views, followed by a relaxing day in Gokyo.

itinerary.title: Trek from Gokyo to Dole
itinerary.description: Descend through familiar alpine landscapes back to Dole.

itinerary.title: Trek from Dole to Namche Bazaar
itinerary.description: Continue downhill and rejoin the main Everest trail, returning to Namche Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Trek from Namche Bazaar to Lukla
itinerary.description: Final trekking day through villages and suspension bridges to Lukla, celebrating completion of the trek.

itinerary.title: Flight from Lukla to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Morning flight back to Kathmandu, marking the end of an unforgettable Himalayan journey.
